name: components/color-picker
description: A redesigned color picker component with decomposed sub-components: ColorPanel (saturation-value 2D board), HueSlider, AlphaSlider, ColorInput (editable HEX/RGB/HSL with format switching), ColorPreview (old/new comparison), and ColorSwatches (preset palette). Supports inline and popover modes, alpha channel, and EyeDropper API.
useCases: Theme customization UIs with editable color inputs and preset swatches
Design tools requiring precise color control with old/new preview comparison
Form fields needing compact popover color selection with alpha support
Applications needing format-agnostic color input (HEX, RGB, HSL) with live switching
